questionHtml: Calculate the price at which excess demand of 18 widgets would result.
markschemeHtml:
249 − 4P = 150 + 14P + 18
81 = 18P

Any valid working is sufficient for [1].

P = $4.50

An answer of 4.50 (without working) is sufficient for [1].
